name: Cardamom Carrots
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Carrots, peeled and diagonally sliced (1/4 inch thick)
-seeds pounded in a mortar (or 1/2-1 tsp. ground cardamom)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam carrots for 5 to 7 minutes or just until tender.
2. Melt butter; add grated orange rind and cardamom.
3. Toss carrots in butter mixture. Add salt to taste.
4. Place in serving dish. May be prepared ahead and reheated over low heat. Serves 8.
